arts.ttl: Badredine Bouanani set to extend OGC Nice contract
arts.sum: Whilst talks to extend Marcin Bulka’s (24) deal have arrived at a dead end, OGC Nice are expecting a more positive conclusion from talks with Badredine Bouanani (19). Bouanani started…

arts.ttl: Marcin Bulka seeks end-of-season OGC Nice departure after rejecting contract extension
arts.sum: L’Équipe understands that Marcin Bulka (24) has rejected a contract extension offer from OGC Nice and is looking to leave the club at the end of the season. Since joining Nice…
